channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scoop: Trump gave Saudi crown prince his backing for risky strikes on Houthis
item.description: President Trump gave Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed Bin Salman his support for an unusual military action against Iran-backed Houthis in...

item.title: Senate considers Russia sanctions bill to honor Graham
item.description: Bipartisan senators are backing a revised Russia sanctions package to honor the late Sen. Lindsey Graham.

item.title: Trump to address Iran and election integrity in prime-time speech
item.description: President Trump's Thursday speech from the White House will cover election integrity, Iran, and other topics.

item.title: Google's Hassabis urges U.S.-led global AI watchdog
item.description: Demis Hassabis calls for a U.S.-led AI watchdog with authority to screen the world's most advanced AI systems.
